original_text:
### Charts & Infographics
- Clean, easy to scan, consistent with the system. Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.
- **Color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.** Placebo/comparator: neutral gray.
- Bars and chart icons: **rounded, approachable** shapes (rounded bar tops).
- Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.
- Statistical callouts: **large and bold** (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a **lighter weight beneath**.
- Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.

relations.note: Color logic applies within the standard chart container.
Headline styling sits on the chart container header.

quotes: Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.
Clean, easy to scan, consistent with the system. Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.

rules.intent: Keep chart containers visually consistent and legible.
rules.rule_text: Charts must be clean, easy to scan, and consistent with the system: the container uses uniform rounded corners with a Light Blue (chart.container.fill = #E6F0F9) panel and a Brand Blue (chart.header.fill = #00529b) rounded header bar.

effect.reserved_for: emphasis on key figures/data points only
effect.subject: Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a)

quotes: Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.
Color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.

rules.intent: Reserve accent colors for emphasis and keep comparator data neutral.
rules.rule_text: In charts, Brand Blue (chart.bars.color = #00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) are dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) are reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only. Placebo/comparator series use neutral gray (color.chart.placebo_gray).

quotes: Bars and chart icons: **rounded, approachable** shapes (rounded bar tops).

rules.intent: Maintain the approachable, rounded chart aesthetic.
rules.rule_text: Bars and chart icons use rounded, approachable shapes with rounded bar tops (chart.bars.style).

quotes: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.
Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.

rules.intent: Standardize chart headline typography and accent rule.
rules.rule_text: Chart headlines use Agenda in print / Nunito Sans Bold+ in email (chart.headline.font), set ALL CAPS (chart.headline.case = all_caps), in Brand Blue (chart.headline.color = #00529b), with a thin Gold rule beneath (chart.headline.rule_color = #ffc60a).

quotes: Statistical callouts: **large and bold** (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a **lighter weight beneath**.
Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.

rules.intent: Establish clear data hierarchy: hero figure, supporting copy, separated footnotes.
rules.rule_text: Statistical callouts are large and bold with the % figure as the hero, and supporting copy set in a lighter weight beneath. Footnotes are noticeably smaller and clearly separated from primary data.
